howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Three Simple Steps to Your Ride

step1.title: Enter Your Location
step1.desc: Enter your pickup location and destination. Use GPS for instant detection or type it in manually.

step2.title: Choose Your Ride
step2.desc: Select from our fleet of Economy, Comfort, Premium, or Van options to match your needs and budget.

step3.title: Confirm & Go
step3.desc: Review your booking details, confirm, and your driver will be on the way. It's that simple.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Questions? We Have Answers
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our taxi service, booking process, and payment options.

q1.q: How do I book a ride?
q1.a: You can book a ride through our website by filling out the booking form with your pickup location, destination, contact details, and preferred time. You'll receive confirmation via email and WhatsApp.

q2.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q2.a: We accept cash, credit cards, debit cards, mobile payments, and digital wallets. Payment can be made directly to the driver or through our secure online payment system.

q3.q: Can I schedule a ride in advance?
q3.a: Yes, you can schedule rides up to 30 days in advance. Simply select "Schedule" when booking and choose your preferred date and time.

q4.q: Are your drivers licensed and insured?
q4.a: All our drivers are fully licensed, background-checked, and insured. We maintain high safety standards and regularly train our drivers for professional service.

q5.q: What if I need to cancel my booking?
q5.a: You can cancel your booking by contacting us via phone or WhatsApp. Cancellations made at least 1 hour before pickup time are free of charge.

q6.a: Yes, we offer reliable airport transfer services with flight tracking. Our drivers monitor your flight status and adjust pickup times accordingly.

q7.q: Is there a limit on luggage?
q7.a: Luggage capacity depends on the vehicle type. Our booking form allows you to specify the number of bags, and we'll ensure the appropriate vehicle is assigned.

q8.a: Yes, we provide 24/7 service throughout the week. Whether it's an early morning flight or late-night event, we're here to serve you.

about.storyP1: Founded with a vision to revolutionize urban transportation, Ryde has been serving customers with dedication and excellence. We understand that getting from point A to point B should be more than just a ride — it should be an experience that's comfortable, reliable, and stress-free.
about.storyP2: Our commitment to quality service has made us a trusted name in the taxi industry. Whether you need a quick ride across town or a scheduled pickup for an important appointment, Ryde is here to serve you 24/7.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable transportation services that connect people to their destinations with comfort and convenience.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the leading taxi service provider, setting the standard for excellence in urban transportation through innovation and customer care.

safety.title: Safety & Security
safety.desc: All our drivers are thoroughly vetted and our vehicles are regularly maintained for your safety.

availability.title: 24/7 Availability
